text: A healthy lifestyle is about more than just avoiding illness; it is about feeling your best every day. A balanced diet, rich in fruits, vegetables, and whole grains, gives your body the fuel it needs. Regular exercise, even a short daily walk, strengthens your heart and lifts your mood. Never underestimate the power of good sleep, as it helps your body recover and your mind stay sharp. Finally, remember your mental health. Managing stress through hobbies or quiet time, and maintaining a healthy work-life balance by setting boundaries, are crucial for long-term happiness and well-being.
